title: POST-H-006-D — Reporte de hotspots CLI y ownership por comando
capabilities: Differentiates migrated, registered_only and legacy CLI commands.
Calculates command counts by domain, owner, risk level and side effects.
Identifies commands without explicit cli_commands/ApplicationService boundary.
Infers Test Contract Registry association from recommended_tests.
Produces read-only JSON/Markdown hotspot and ownership reports for POST-H-006-E/POST-H-007 planning.
validation_commands: python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id CliCommandRegistry --instance outputs/reports/cli_command_registry.json --json
known_limitations: The hotspot report is advisory and does not yet fail on legacy growth.
Test-contract association is inferred from recommended_tests and may be broader than command-specific coverage.
The report does not migrate additional handlers and does not create a runtime registry router.
Full no-growth enforcement is reserved for POST-H-006-E.
